title: lepisorus lewisii
intro: Lepisorus lewisii, also known as Lewis's Cliff Fern or Lewis's Lip Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to the Pacific coast of North America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus lewisii include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Lepisorus lewisii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
